noise masking masks disturbances as you sleep</h3> <p class="p-body-copy-02"> Noisy neighbours, a snoring partner or traffic disturbing your sleep? These sleep buds can help. Once the biosensors detect that you're sleeping, white or coloured noise is played to mask out external sounds. Use the Kokoon app to select the type of masking sound you want, or turn it off altogether. </p> </div> </div> <div class="p-s12__feature-item p-spacing-bottom-c"> <div class="p-s12__feature-image sound</h3> <p class="p-body-copy-02"> These sleep buds boast balanced-armature drivers specially designed to bring you clear sound while maintaining the barely-there feel of each earbud. Combined with excellent passive noise isolation, courtesy of the snug fit, you can let the world fade away as you relax with your sounds. </p> </div> </div> <div class="p-s12__feature-item to reach</h3> <p class="p-body-copy-02"> Carefully positioned so it gently hugs the nape of your neck, the neckband control unit is curved and clad in soft material so it's comfy in any sleeping position. The unit's multifunction button lets you adjust the volume or pick up calls — if you're still awake! </p> </div> </div> </div> <div class="p-s12__row"> <div class="p-s12__feature-item p-spacing-bottom-c"> <div class="p-s12__feature-description p-spacing-bottom-a"> <h3 class="p-heading-04-large p-heading-bold p-feature-title">Bluetooth connectivity lets you stream from any source</h3> <p class="p-body-copy-02">Want to fall asleep to music or an audiobook on the beach? These sleep buds will stream content from any platform, and you can blend what you hear with Kokoon's soundscapes. Simply keep the Kokoon app open to hear a crackling fire or distant surf as you listen to the next tune or chapter.</p> </div> </div> <div class="p-s12__feature-item p-spacing-bottom-c"> <div class="p-s12__feature-description p-spacing-bottom-a"> <h3 class="p-heading-04-large p-heading-bold p-feature-title">Better sleep, better days with sleep tracking</h3> <p class="p-body-copy-02">Get more from your days when you get more from your nights! The Kokoon app gives you daily insights into your sleep, so you can determine what factors affect its quality and make simple tweaks to your routine. After a free trial, the app is available for a monthly subscription.*</p> </div> </div> <div class="p-s12__feature-item p-spacing-bottom-c"> <div class="p-s12__feature-description p-spacing-bottom-a"> <h3 class="p-heading-04-large p-heading-bold p-feature-title">Up to 10 hours of play time and easy USB-C charging</h3> <p class="p-body-copy-02">You get 10 hours of play time from a full charge, plenty to see you through the night. The earbuds can be recharged fully in 2 hours via a USB-C cable plugged into the control unit, and the included carrying pouch keeps the buds safe when not in use.</p> </div> </div> </div> <div class="p-s12__row"> <div class="p-s12__feature-item p-spacing-bottom-c"> <div class="p-s12__feature-description p-spacing-bottom-a"> <h3 class="p-heading-04-large p-heading-bold p-feature-title">Relax and catch up. Clear calls via the headphones</h3> <p class="p-body-copy-02">Chat to a friend while you're unwinding before bed, or stay open to family calls during your afternoon nap.
